sourcePrompt: A defensive perimeter berm section about eight meters long. A bulldozed earth embankment rising to chest height, its forward face steep and its rear sloping into a shallow walkway, the crest topped with a course or two of sandbags forming a firing line. Raw shoved earth and tan sandbags, the camp's hard edge. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
